caption: A person's hand holds a clear plastic card sleeve over a table featuring a colorful mat with teal palm trees and an orange sun. In the background, a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt sits behind a desk with various sports cards and equipment. The text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" appears in red and white logos across the top of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves the plastic sleeve across the frame, shifting from a view of stacked white and yellow boxes to a close-up of the sleeve. The man in the background remains seated, occasionally looking toward the camera or the items on the desk. The action focuses on the manipulation of the clear sleeve against the backdrop of the card-breaking station and the branded table mat.
